{# Vendor list partial — sortable table with blacklisted toggle and cadence clocks. Receives: vendors, q, hide_blacklisted, sort, dir, total, limit, offset, now_utc. Each vendor has .cadence_state attached by the route (tier=None → standard 30d). Called by: vendors_list_partial route. Depends on: brand palette, timeago filter. #}

{{ total }} vendor{{ "s" if total != 1 }}

{# Tab bar: All Vendors / My Vendors #}
All Vendors My Vendors Find by Part
{# Filter bar #}
{% if my_only %}{% endif %}
{# Sort by stalest outbound #}
{# View toggle: table / cards #}
{# Card grid view #} {% if view == 'cards' and vendors %}
{% for v in vendors %} {% include "htmx/partials/vendors/vendor_card.html" %} {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {# Cadence dot color map \u2014 same keys as customer _account_list.html #} {% set dot_colors = {"new": "bg-gray-300", "on_target": "bg-emerald-400", "due": "bg-amber-400", "overdue": "bg-rose-500"} %} {# Table view #} {% if view != 'cards' and vendors %}
{# Cadence dot column \u2014 no label, narrow #} {% for col_name, col_key in [('Vendor', 'display_name'), ('Score', None), ('Sightings', 'sighting_count'), ('Win Rate', 'overall_win_rate'), ('Location', 'hq_country'), ('Industry', 'industry')] %} {% endfor %} {% for v in vendors %} {# Cadence dot #} {# Dual cadence clocks #} {% endfor %}
{% if col_key %} {{ col_name }} {% if sort == col_key %} {% endif %} {% else %} {{ col_name }} {% endif %} Cadence

{{ v.display_name }}

{% if v.domain %}

{{ v.domain }}

{% endif %}
{% if v.is_blacklisted %} Blacklisted {% elif v.vendor_score %} {{ "%.0f"|format(v.vendor_score) }} {% else %} — {% endif %} {{ v.sighting_count or 0 }} {{ "%.0f%%"|format(v.overall_win_rate * 100) if v.overall_win_rate else "\u2014" }} {{ v.hq_country or "\u2014" }} {{ v.industry or "\u2014" }}

Out {{ v.last_outbound_at|timeago if v.last_outbound_at else "never" }}

Reply {{ v.last_reply_at|timeago if v.last_reply_at else "\u2014" }}

{# Pagination #} {% if total > limit %}
{% if offset > 0 %} Prev {% endif %} {{ offset + 1 }}–{{ [offset + limit, total]|min }} of {{ total }} {% if offset + limit < total %} Next {% endif %}
{% endif %} {% endif %} {# Empty state (no vendors at all) #} {% if not vendors %}

No vendors found

{% endif %}
